triageEntries.rationale: The coordinator is a cohesive state-machine boundary covered by adaptive integration, recovery, timeout quarantine, and strict replay tests; split generators and recovery after the adaptive contract stabilizes.
Fixture-only acceptance orchestration with no runtime import path; retained for reproducible legacy acceptance.
Build-time documentation validation only; split adaptive and legacy contract checks after the P6 RC.
Existing v0.2.1 module covered by deterministic LLM evidence tests; transport split remains outside the P6 RC scope.
Acceptance-only evidence tooling; split profile/report and bundle verification after the P6 RC.

The deterministic combination generator and constraint evaluator are pure and covered by constraint, mixed-strength, and unsatisfiable-model tests; split solver and coverage helpers after P8 stabilization.
The adapter is a cohesive Playwright boundary covered by dialog, topology, recovery, and observation integration tests; split observation and execution internals after the P11 contract stabilizes.
The real acceptance runner validates explicit confirmation, required paths, case identity, corpus contract, and environment metadata before loading Lakda or contacting a target.
The CLI is command routing over typed core modules and is covered by help, parsing, and adaptive command tests; split command handlers after P8-P10 CLI contracts stabilize.
The environment value is parsed with URL and passed through Lakda host allowlist validation before browser use.
The external acceptance runner is fail-closed and validates confirmation, immutable corpus, revision, config digest, and HATE refs before handoff; split helpers after P11 evidence stabilizes.
npm_execpath is required, checked for presence, and passed to execFileSync without a shell before validating npm pack JSON.
Mode dispatch remains regression-covered; executor split is deferred until after the P6 RC compatibility boundary is frozen.
